title: The Truly Magical White Desert

scenes.text: This desert shimmers like snow but is made of gypsum.
This is White Sands, located in New Mexico, USA.
White Sands is the largest gypsum dune field in the world, covering over 275 square miles.
The dunes react to the sunlight, creating a mesmerizing glow.
scenes.label: MESMERIZING GLOW

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 White Sands, New Mexico - USA. A surreal desert that glows brilliantly under the sun, made entirely of shimmering gypsum. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
